name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador v2: 10-stage PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Adds ARCH (project scan + architecture.md), COMPLEXITY (Lite/Completo heuristic), BRAINSTORM_GERAL (parallel domain orchestration with requirements-clarity, Codex and AGY as domain lenses), and per-feature isolation under .pensador/feature-nN/. Mandatory Code Base Memory (codebase-memory-mcp) exploration before PRD/Spec generation, plus optional OpenSpec spec mode (PRD vs Spec chosen in INIT). Supports --modo claude|agy|kiro|codex to delegate the workflow's heavy work to an external CLI (Antigravity, Kiro or Codex) while Claude orchestrates via AskUserQuestion. All dialogue routes through AskUserQuestion.
